code:
import io
import string

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut idx = n
    while i < n and idx == n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if idx < n
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
      let val = string.substring(line, idx + 1, n)
      if string.len(key) > 0
        println("#{key}:#{val}")
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
